default_model: glm-5.1 (pinned best — flat-rate quota is hard to exhaust; degrading it would waste paid-for intelligence)
token_economy: Cheap / flat-rate, under-used quota — a default workhorse. Use freely for the bulk of coding, testing, and structured output once the task is well-scaffolded. Subagent fan-out ON: native `opencode agent` support; internal parallelism converts idle quota into wall-clock speedup on decomposable tasks.
role: GENERAL-PURPOSE workhorse with a comparative edge in code quality and implementation: tests, edge-case analysis, code review, structured markdown deliverables. best_for = comparative advantage under contention, NOT a partition. Native agent/subagent support.
